case_title: GUSTAV ERPEN VS. ALEXANDER MIGUEL ANDERSON et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERPEN, GUSTAV AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, ALEXANDER MIGUEL ALSO KNOWN AS  PHILIP JACOBSEN AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, ALEXANDER MIGUEL ALSO KNOWN AS  PHILIP JACOBSEN AN INDIVIDUAL
